name: Vessel Craftsman
summary: Vessel Craftsman — a 510 cartridge battery for patients using 510 cartridges.
description: The Craftsman incorporates Vessel’s signature protected drop-in cartridge chamber, securing the cartridge while maintaining a sleek, ergonomic silhouette. The combination of warm natural wood and durable metal gives the device both lifestyle appeal and long-lasting reliability. Fully charge the device using the magnetic USB cable. Insert a 510-thread cartridge into the protected drop-in chamber. Pairs with standard 510 cartridges.
